query:
-- Update WealthBridge AZ with gold/navy color scheme
UPDATE organization_landing_page_config 
SET primaryColor = '#D4AF37', secondaryColor = '#1B2A4A', accentColor = '#F5E6B8',
    headline = 'WealthBridge Arizona', subtitle = 'Your trusted financial partner in the Grand Canyon State',
    ctaText = 'Get Started', ctaLink = '/chat'
WHERE organizationId = 1;

-- Update WealthBridge with navy/white color scheme  
UPDATE organization_landing_page_config 
SET primaryColor = '#1B2A4A', secondaryColor = '#FFFFFF', accentColor = '#0EA5E9',
    headline = 'WealthBridge', subtitle = 'Intelligent financial guidance for every stage of life',
    ctaText = 'Get Started', ctaLink = '/chat'
WHERE organizationId = 2;
